wombos.definition: A fascinating, cinematic experience worth obsessively analyzing — something amazing that happened but also left you with more questions than answers. A peanemis of something mysterious.
A park bench — the quintessential wombo setting for outdoor emotional events, breakups, ponchalashouts, and quiche loreaining sessions. Used as a noun for both the object and the vibe.
